feed.subject: fix: expose config-needed status truth
feat: ship public Stratos install flow
chore(test): make 'npm test' the honest hermetic suite, not the mock harness
fix(api-shim): harden shutdown so optional channel adapters can't throw during PM2 reload
fix(local-inference): report the actual local model; stop silently forcing gemma2:2b
docs(truth): reconcile stale mocks — peer-compute/mesh is REAL (node bundle); on-chain rewards intentionally not-live (not a stub)
docs(truth): correct stale 'Cloud tier unimplemented' — it's built + tested (BYOK + OpenRouter, 47 checks)
merge(security): exec job-policy gate + symlink-traversal hardening (trust substrate → live)
fix(web): real working install — efficientlabs.ai/install.sh + @efficientlabs/stratos
feat(web): live Stripe checkout — monthly default + annual toggle (2 months free)
feat(web): dark default + glassmorphism + per-command copy + real status + customizable OS
feat(web): OS light-first theme + Mobbin dashboard, distinct in-depth nav pages, 5-tier pricing, live status feed
fix(api-shim): shutdown handler — rename param shadowing the SignalAdapter (signal.stop TypeError)
feat(stratos): operating-core live tap — flag-gated, default-off, fail-open (deep phase increment 5)
feat(stratos): model-agnostic routing — policies + unified adapter (deep phase increment 4)
feat(stratos): self-improvement compression engine (deep phase increment 3)
feat(stratos): eval-engine (deep phase increment 2)
feat: sovereign Composio adapter + operating-architecture layer (docs + files-first core)
chore: deploy author verification [redacted]
docs: architecture + context-routing (operating architecture layer)
feat(web): Atmosphere OS at /app (11 honest modules) + mobile & motion polish
chore(web): add marketing ad images + commercial videos (own-your-ai, stop-paying-rent, efl-commercial 16x9/9x16)
feat(web): nav→standalone pages, ChatGPT-style /docs, mobile fixes
feat(mesh): wallet attribution — every node's compute attributed to its owner Solana wallet
feat(telegram): gemma4:e4b chat agent + persistent typing + token-streaming
feat(mesh): origin records a signed capability receipt per verified job
feat(content): sovereign content engine — infinite personal-brand + EL pipeline
Merge pull request #57 from EfficientLabs-ai/feat/phone-voice
chore: rename btn-ghost utility to btn-outline (scrub 'ghost' from the surface)
chore(secrecy): scrub private node tooling from the repo + drop stale audit framing
feat(memory): dialectic user-modeling — the agent that grows with you (differentiator)
feat(security): policy-as-code egress firewall on the sandbox (top-3 #3, anti-exfiltration)
feat(automation): daily finance-digest to Telegram (council business-automation #1)
feat(ci): honesty-matrix guard — block deploy on any overclaim vs the status enum (council #3)
feat(demo): stratos demo — the wired '$0 bill' vertical-slice proof (council wedge)
feat(moat): Signed Capability Receipt — the cross-machine proof rail (council keystone)
docs: master program-status ledger + council moat/automation roadmap
feat(skills): SKILL.md / agentskills.io portability (top-3 #2, ecosystem moat)
feat(voice): native open-source talk/hear/see — local, zero-cost, out-of-the-box
feat(memory): FTS5 cross-session memory search (top-3 feature #1, native)
feat(model): consolidate to Gemma 4 — gemma2:2b fast default + gemma4:e4b multimodal; drop qwen
feat(voice): call StratosAgent over the phone via ElevenLabs Agents (Hermes pattern)
feat(ui): T3 — Sovereign Path section + thesis depth
feat(ui): premium micro-interaction layer — subtle, GPU-cheap, reduced-motion-safe
feat(ui): T2 design-system consistency — Hybrid (aurora heroes + brutalist edges)
fix(mobile): T1 parity — stop overflow in StatusMatrix, Terminal + grid sections
fix(mobile): show the full StratosAgent-in-space scene on mobile (responsive split)
Merge pull request #56 from EfficientLabs-ai/feat/mesh-signal
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' into feat/mesh-signal
docs: North Star + reverse-engineered roadmap + CS/methodology research (file-architecture-first) (#51)
fix(mesh): read fleet.json totals + add a mtime liveness gate (review finding #3)
fix(routing): forward-port #55 (fast gemma2:2b local default) into the consolidated router
feat(routing): STRATOS_CLOUD_AUTO_ESCALATE flag — secure-by-default (review finding #2)
docs(review): independent pre-merge review of the sovereignty-critical router path
docs(reality): record the trust substrate in STATE_OF_REALITY (honest, branch-not-live)
test(ci): register the trust substrate in the hermetic CI allowlist
fix(routing): a named cloud model must not force cloud; drop dead classifier code
feat(routing): wire a real mesh-availability signal into the router
feat(cli): stratos route — preview the sovereign routing decision
feat(cli): stratos ledger + stratos id — observe the trust substrate
feat(routing): wire the sovereign router into the LIVE request path
feat(routing): one simple sovereign model router (local default, cloud opt-in)
feat(security): wire the trust trifecta LIVE through the executor
feat(identity): identity broker — short-lived brokered assertions (IDJAG/auth.md)
feat(ledger): attribution ledger — measurement before rewards
feat(security): ACTIVATE the capability gate — compiler stamps caps, executor enforces
feat(cli): stratos icm — init/validate the folders-over-agents workspace
feat(context): ICM workspace — the 'folders over agents' contract (L0-L4)
feat(model): add Gemma 4 tiers to the local-model ladder (verified, fallback-safe)
feat(security): capability gate — least-privilege enforcement for signed skills
fix(mobile): gate WebGL hero to capable desktops; static crash-safe hero on mobile/touch
feat: dashboard.efficientlabs.ai vanity host -> founder /ops (gated, noindex)
feat(seo): host-based noindex proxy — only efficientlabs.ai is indexable
feat(seo): go-live SEO + mobile hamburger nav
security(ops): proper server-side founder gate for /ops (HMAC session)
feat: founder ops dashboard + sharpened positioning (#1)
perf(router): default local routing to fast gemma2:2b (configurable) (#55)
security: F3 + F4 — remove shell-string execution + escape Telegram HTML (#54)
security(api-shim): F2 — opt-in shared-secret auth on the loopback gateway (#53)
security(api-shim): F1 — execFile for ffmpeg, remove shell-injection class (#52)
